App: Dimpact e2e test
Test Environment: Test

Feature:Login 5

Scenario:
Bob wants to login to ZAC
3

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 879ms

When "Bob" logs in 954ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 2s 399ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 411ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 975ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 1s 72ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 21ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 525ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 26ms

When "Bob" logs in 816ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 2s 317ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 642ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 880ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 1s 92ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 22ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 520ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 28ms

When "Bob" logs in 980ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 2s 322ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" < 1ms

And the page is done searching < 1ms

And there are at least 3 zaken < 1ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken < 1ms

And "Bob" distributes the zaken to the first group available < 1ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of zaken is starting < 1ms

And after a while the snackbar disappears < 1ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/taken/werkvoorraad" < 1ms

Scenario:
Bob releases taken
7

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 3s 308ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/taken/werkvoorraad" 1s 718ms

And the page is done searching 4s 720ms

And "Bob" releases the taken 298ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the releasement of taken is complete 1s 388ms
